securityTestsSummary: services/campaign-runner/test/js-value.test.ts: 20 tests pass. Every sandbox-escape attempt returns the safe-empty string '' (never reaching the host), proven for: `return process`, `return require('fs')`, `return global`, `this.constructor.constructor('return process')()`, `customer.constructor.constructor('return process')()`, `({}).constructor.constructor('return this.process')()`. `return globalThis` yields only the EMPTY context global (no host leak: typeof globalThis.process==='undefined', typeof globalThis.require==='undefined', and globalThis.constructor.constructor('return typeof process')() ==='undefined'). An infinite loop `while(true){}` is killed by the 100ms timeout -> ''. The {{}} INJECTION test: a customer attribute value of `");return this.process;("` interpolated via JSON.stringify becomes a QUOTED literal -> evaluates to the harmless injected STRING, never the host process. Valid cases all correct: customer.first_name.toUpperCase()->'JO', (event.amount*1.1).toFixed(2)->'110.00', bare expression customer.email, event.* on a no-event ctx -> safe-empty, undefined/null -> '', Math/JSON intrinsics available.
testSummary: Unit: @cdp/shared 59 pass (incl js-value-spec type/guard); @cdp/service-campaign-runner 205 pass incl integration (js-value security+valid, multi-assignment validate/processNode/buildSetAttribute nested-jsonb_set, trigger label, set-attribute-value-spec, process-node-decision updated to assignments shape); web campaigns 84 pass (node-config write/read round-trip incl assignments[]+js+legacy, nodeSummary 1/N/legacy, trigger label). Integration (REAL Postgres :5433/cdp): multi-assignment.integration writes ALL 3 attrs (literal+expression+js with a {{customer.*}} placeholder) in one nested-jsonb_set UPDATE, workspace-scoped (other-tenant same-email profile untouched), idempotent on re-tick; set-attribute-event-sourced still green.
e2eSummary: All SOLO (one Playwright at a time; ports 8788/5174 freed between runs). campaign-node-editors: 10/10 pass incl the NEW 'UPDATE-PROFILE editor: a LIST of assignments (a literal + a JS value w/ placeholder) round-trips' and 'TRIGGER editor: a cosmetic name persists and shows on the trigger card'. Regression: campaign-builder 11/11, campaign-publish-gate 2/2, broadcast-and-campaign 12/12, build-segment 10/10 -- NO regressions.
notes: TEST-FIRST throughout. No migration (definition is jsonb). NOT pushed. buildSetAttribute signature CHANGED to (ws, profile, assignments[]) with nested jsonb_set (every value a bound ::jsonb param, inv.6); set_attribute SideEffect now carries `assignments`. Existing runner tests asserting the old single key/value side-effect + old buildSetAttribute signature were updated to the new contract. lintOk=true means NO NEW lint errors -- the 7 reported are the KNOWN pre-existing react-hooks 'rule not found' errors in EmailDesigner/Activity/ProfileDetail/SegmentBuilder/SimpleScreens (none in changed files). @cdp/shared stays isomorphic: it holds only the JsValueSpec TYPE + isJsSpec guard and never imports node:vm; the evaluator lives node-only in services/campaign-runner/src/js-value.ts.
